Notice Of Motio To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Oct-23-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: Notice Of Motion To Compel Arbitration is GRANTED. Based on allegations in the Complaint and supporting evidence, this action shall proceed in arbitration. Rosenthal v. Great Western Fin. Securities Corp. (1996) 14 Cal.4th 394. Plaintiff's reliance on Main v. Merrill Lynch, Pierce, Fenner & Smith, Inc. (1977) 67 Cal.App.3d 19 is misplaced. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Defendant Chew Yee Association'S Motion To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Oct-23-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant Chew Yee Association's Motion To Compel Arbitration.

The motion will be heard in Department 501, the Real Property/Housing Court, at 9:30am on October 23, 2018. That department hears all lease agreement matters. All future law and motion matters in this case must be noticed to be heard in Department 501.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR#8600, Maria.Torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/HK)
